result.status_detail: wrtn.ai session logged out (top-right shows '무료로 회원가입' + '로그인', no in-page avatar). W4+W6 regression could not be exercised on an authenticated dispatch path.

notes: W4+W6 regression check vs baseline. Opened wrtn.ai -> hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R). Landing page renders with top-right '무료로 회원가입' (Sign up free) and '로그인' (Login) buttons and NO in-page avatar -> logged out. Per task auth gate (in-page avatar check), logged-out/login state = FAIL_AUTH. Same FAIL_AUTH regression class as #1204 / #1225 (onboarding phone-verification gate) / #1246 (logged out). Did NOT submit the test PII prompt: although a chat input is visible on the public landing page, the test targets the authenticated WS/dispatch path and a logged-out submission would not be a valid regression comparison. Auth must be restored on the test PC before W4+W6 can be re-verified.
